task.prompt:
Visit the top 2 closed pull requests on this page and read off each                                                                                        
  PR's author username. For each author: use the search action to find                                                                                       
  "<author> site:linkedin.com", then use goto_search_result with                                                                                             
  url_filter="/in/" to navigate to the first LinkedIn profile in the
  results, then take a viewport screenshot. Save each screenshot under                                                                                       
  a folder named after the repo slug (input_data.repo with "/" replaced                  
  by "-"). Read the profile and return one item per author with repo,                                                                                        
  author, linkedin_url, school (most recent education entry),                                                                                                
  current_company (top role in the experience section), and tenure                                                                                           
  (how long at that company).

samples.error: plan parse: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
